Name: Heater
Description: Heater debuted in All-New Venom #2 by Al Ewing and Carlos Gomez Guardsman Armor: Heater wears green guardsman armor Energy Weapon: Her right gauntlet has an energy cannon. Tentacles: When Doc Ock takes over SCAR, he outfits the field agents with robotic arms just like his.
